title: Dorry Falls with Honor — Part 6
description: On pages 24–25, dorry falls with honor — part 6 as dorry and Brogy’s duel reaches a heartbreaking turning point as Baroque Works exploits the giants’ warrior pride.

dialogue.text: Gabababa! Making such excuses in a relentless fight to the death,

dialogue.text: Who vows to give a fight... Cough Cough! Worthy of Elbaff's honour!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Doskoi Panda's headquarters are located on mirror ball island in East Blue.

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: That's a brand name. It's very popular in East Blue Right now. And pretty expensive - very high class. One shirt might run you a good 10,000 bell. Between of the imposter brand "Dosk01 Panda."
